user_query:
Translate the Indonesian lyrics in input/lyrics.md into singable, natural English with the exact output format: structured markdown with three sections: "### Original (Indonesian)", "### Translation (English)", and "### Notes". Keep the section labels consistent with the original (e.g., Verse, Chorus, Bridge). Avoid AI-sounding phrasing and keep syllable flow/rhythm. Save the translated deliverable to output/lyric__beralio__galau-di-malam.md using the stable identity naming template.

Design a small multi-stage workflow plan for this translation and QA, with roles, tasks, inputs/outputs, and a checkpoint after the translation stage. Save it strictly named as output/20260419__process__lyric-translation__v1.0.0__lyrics.qa__workspace.yaml.

Simulate an audit trail for one run of that workflow with at least 6 events (including process_started and process_completed, plus task_started/task_completed and a checkpoint_waiting/approved). Save it as output/20260419-120000__snapshot__translation-audit.jsonl.

Finally, write a concise cheat sheet describing the metadata naming rules you used (strict mode pattern and stable identity template) and justify the chosen filenames above. Save it to output/doc__workspace__metadata-naming-cheatsheet.md.

Do not use any non-text media. Read only from input/, and write only to output/.
